headline: Risk-on holds; desk slate SHC/UAA/VTEX/ATEC live — macro dominated by hot PCE vs. falling crude crosscurrent

market_state.line: SPY -0.04% / QQQ -0.42%, both above 50d; VXX stress 0.98 — vol benign. Micron beat lifting semis; hot PCE keeps cut hopes capped.

actions.line: Quarter size — signal/risk agree, research neutral; R/R ~2:1, tight stop at 16.34.
Half size — cleanest risk on the slate, low severity; 12¢ stop, 24¢ to target.
Quarter size — strong signal, but volatile 1d gap flags medium risk; 13¢ stop, 27¢ target.

watch.line: +36.5% on 2.94x volume — overbought flag; watch for fade setup after open.
+16.5% on 3.45x vol — highest rel-vol on scan, overbought; fade or continuation to monitor.
+12.7% on 2.55x vol — unusual volume without overbought flag; worth tracking for follow-through.
-14.5% on 1.88x vol — big gap down, no catalyst listed; watch for stabilization/bounce level.
-11.3% oversold on 1.13x vol — oversold flag; potential mean-reversion candidate post-open.

changed: Macro cross-current added: hot Core PCE (4%+ 3yr high) vs. collapsing crude — rate-hike chatter resurfacing

caveats: AH/Pre-market scan as of 09:22 ET 2026-06-25 — prices stale pre-open; all four desk entries are limit levels that may gap through at RTH open.
Hot PCE + possible Fed hike discussion is a live regime-change risk for long-duration/growth longs — VTEX and ATEC most exposed if front-end yields spike further.
